description.value: > Friendship Your faith in your friends bolsters the strength of your faith in your god. Associated Domain: Good. Replacement Power: The following granted power replaces the touch of good power of the Good domain. Powerful Bond (Su) As a free action, you can open a link to communicate telepathically with a single ally within 60 feet. The telepathic link is two-way and lasts for 1 minute. Unlike normal telepathy, this ability requires a shared language. You can use this ability a number of times per day equal to 3 + your Wisdom modifier. Replacement Domain Spells: 2ndâ shield other, 5thâ telepathic bond.
